searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: List of search terms to query on Google Maps (e.g. plumbers in Austin, coffee shops NYC). Each query runs independently.
prefill: coffee shops in San Francisco, CA

maxResults.title: Max Results Per Query
maxResults.description: Maximum number of listings to scrape per search query.

extractEmails.title: Extract Emails
extractEmails.description: Visit each business website and attempt to extract email addresses. Increases run time significantly.

extractRating.title: Extract Rating & Reviews
extractRating.description: Extract star rating and review count.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent pages. Higher = faster but more likely to trigger rate limits.

proxyCountry.title: Proxy Country
proxyCountry.description: ISO country code for proxy (e.g. US, GB, DE). Leave empty for automatic.

domain.title: Google Domain
domain.description: Custom Google domain (e.g. google.co.uk, google.de). Leave empty for google.com.

maxTotalResults.title: Global Result Limit
maxTotalResults.description: Hard limit on total listings across all queries. 0 means unlimited.
